intended_use: The UltraSight Guidance is intended to assist medical professionals (not including expert sonographers) in acquiring cardiac ultrasound images. UltraSight Guidance is an accessory to compatible genera
intended_use_full: The UltraSight Guidance is intended to assist medical professionals (not including expert sonographers) in acquiring cardiac ultrasound images. UltraSight Guidance is an accessory to compatible general-purpose diagnostic ultrasound systems. UltraSight Guidance is indicated for use in two-dimensional transthoracic echocardiography (2D-TTE) for adult patients, specifically in the acquisition of the following standard views: Parasternal Long-Axis (PLAX), Parasternal Short-Axis at the Aortic Valve (PSAX-AV), Parasternal Short-Axis at the Mitral Valve (PSAX-MV), Parasternal Short Axis at the Papillary Muscle (PSAX-PM), Apical 4-Chamber (AP4), Apical 5-Chamber (AP5), Apical 2-Chamber (AP2), Apical 3-Chamber (AP3), Subcostal 4-Chamber (SubC4), and Subcostal Inferior Vena Cava (SC-IVC).
ground_truth: Expert annotation by two independent cardiologists; target cardiac views and view quality (diagnostic vs. non-diagnostic) were annotated by expert cardiologists; in case of disagreement, a third cardiologist provided additional annotation and majority vote determined final label
other_metrics: Mean area under the ROC curve (AUC) with predefined acceptance criteria of AUC ≥ 0.85; Mean false positive rate (FPR) met acceptance criteria of FPR ≤ 0.2 at the green quality threshold; frame-level accuracy assessed via binary classification tests; subgroup analyses conducted across age categories and sex (male and female); US (non-US) comparisons
